name: Vegetable Risotto
recipeIngredient: 2 large leaves of chard (green leaf part and white part)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green leaf part of chard into thin strips. Dice the white part of the chard.
2. Heat butter in a large frying pan. Fry onion, carrot, celery, and diced chard for 2 minutes.
3. Add rice, peas, and diced ham to the pan. Stir well until the rice is transparent.
4. Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof dish. Pour water over the ingredients so that it covers the rice by about 1 1/2 times its volume. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 18-20 minutes.
Variation: You can substitute chard with spinach.
Tip: Adding a little garlic or bacon to the pan while frying onion will enhance the flavor further.
